concepts.finding:
Conclusion 
In the present study we introduce a systematic approach for automatically extract-
ing customer “pain points” from open reviews via the “Review to Pain Matrix” 
pipeline, which integrates the stages of product discovery and delivery, ensuring 
reproducibility, transparency and scalabilit
